work_experience.name: Backend Developer Intern
item: Developed internal REST APIs using FastAPI
Created endpoints for data retrieval, filtering, and processing
Collaborated with senior developers for feature integration
Reduced manual reporting process by automating API-based data retrieval
Improved response structure consistency across several endpoints

project.name: Personal ML Classification Project
item: Built a machine learning classification pipeline using scikit-learn
Performed preprocessing, feature cleaning, and label preparation
Evaluated model performance using precision, recall, and F1-score
Compared Logistic Regression and Random Forest models

project.name: Automation & Data Processing Scripts
item: Created Python scripts for automated data collection and cleaning
Processed CSV and JSON datasets from multiple sources
Built reusable scripts for formatting and validation

project.name: Mini API Service Project
item: Built a small Flask-based API service for testing prediction requests
Implemented basic request validation and logging
